title: He
condition:
Great, he's dead
Oh no, he's not dead
Damn it, he's dead
solution: He and I were generals of two opposing countries, deadlocked on the battlefield for many days. One day, I heard he was dead and happily ordered my troops to advance. Unexpectedly, I saw him again on the battlefield. I thought I had fallen into a trap and ordered a retreat. Later, I found out it was just his statue. I fell for his posthumous trick and missed the best opportunity to deploy my troops.

zh.title: 他
zh.condition:
太好了,他死了
不好,他没死
可恶,他死了
zh.solution: 我和他是两个对立国家的将军,已在阵前相持多日,一日我听说他死了,高兴的下令出兵,没想到又在阵前看见了他,我以为中计,下令退兵,后来才知道那只是他的雕像,我中了他的遗计,错失了用兵的最好时机。

key_facts: A visual misdirection was the key reason for the misjudgment (thinking the opponent wasn't dead).
The opponent used a posthumous stratagem.
The event takes place in the context of military confrontation or intense competition.
The narrator's final regret is related to missing a strategic opportunity, not just the opponent's life or death.
A non-living object was used as a key deception tool, creating the illusion that the opponent was still alive.

title: Rabbit
condition: My sister especially loved rabbits, but one day, she cut open the belly of her favorite little rabbit. Mom was furious, and the next day, my sister disappeared.
solution: My sister really loved rabbits. One day, the rabbit didn't move, as if it were dead. So she suddenly cut open its belly with a knife. Seeing my sister's chilling behavior, Mom was furious. My sister hurriedly explained, "I wanted to change its batteries." Mom walked over to gently comfort her, but my sister continued, "Because when Dad didn't move, Mom did the same thing." I never saw my sister again after that day...

zh.title: 兔子
zh.condition: 我的妹妹特别喜欢兔子,但有一天,她却剖开了她最爱的小兔子的肚子,妈妈勃然大怒,第二天妹妹消失了。
zh.solution: 我的妹妹很喜欢兔子,有一天,兔子一动不动,像是死掉一样,于是她突然用刀剖开了它的肚子,看到妹妹令人毛骨悚然的行为,母亲勃然大怒,妹妹慌忙解释道:"我想给它换电池",妈妈走过去轻声安慰,可妹妹却接着说:"因为爸爸不动的时候,妈妈也是这样的。"从那天之后我再也没见过妹妹..

title: Meeting the Parents
condition: My boyfriend and I are alumni; he's three years older and about to graduate. I felt an instant connection with him, love at first sight. We agreed to get married as soon as I reached the legal age. With the National Day holiday approaching, my boyfriend suggested I stay instead of going home and come meet his parents. I happily agreed. However, when his parents saw my face, they were horrified and strongly opposed our relationship. Why?
solution: This was during the era of reform, opening-up, and the one-child policy. I was an 'excess' child. To keep their jobs, my parents sent me to be raised by distant relatives in the countryside after I was born, and my surname was changed. My parents always provided financial support to the relatives. They were happy to learn I got into a university here and were nearing retirement. They were considering contacting me to bring me back into the family, but who knew that we, biological siblings, had fallen in love? A human tragedy.

zh.title: 见家长
zh.condition: 我和男友是校友,他比我大三届,马上就要毕业了。我总感觉和他心有灵犀,一见钟情,于是我们约好了等我到了法定结婚年龄马上结婚,快要过国庆了,男友对我说,不如假期我不要回去了,来我家见见我父母吧。我欣然同意。然而,男友的父母一看到我的脸,大惊失色,坚决反对我们结婚交往。这是为什么呢?
zh.solution: 这是刚刚改革开放,计划生育的年代。我是超生的孩子,为了保住工作,生下我之后父母把我送到乡下给远方亲戚抚养,并且改了姓。父母一直对亲戚进行着经济援助,得知我考上了这里的大学父母也很开心,而且也快要退休了。正在考虑是不是要联系到我让我回到这个家庭,谁知道我们亲兄妹竟然相爱了,人间悲剧。

She was fostered or sent away.
This is related to the one-child policy of that time.
The boyfriend's parents know the girl.
The boyfriend's parents are the girl's biological parents.
The parents recognized her by her appearance.
The girl and her boyfriend are related by blood.
They are biological siblings.
The girl's current surname is not her original one.

title: Bottle by the Sea
condition: I was walking home. The sea breeze gently blew, and I watched the bottle sink into the seabed, feeling as if I had forgotten something. The sky also seemed noticeably darker than before... Oh well, I should just hurry home.
solution: I am a materialist. One day, on my way home, I picked up a bottle washed ashore by the waves. From the bottle flew out a mysterious creature that called itself a genie and claimed it could grant wishes. Such a huge creature coming from such a small bottle, able to speak, and claiming to grant wishes—this contradicted my understanding of the world. So, I wished to forget everything about the bottle and for the bottle to return to the sea. The wish was granted, and I forgot everything about the bottle.

zh.title: 海边的瓶子
zh.condition:
我走在回家的路上。
海风轻轻地吹过,我看着那个瓶子沉入海底,感觉好像忘记了什么,天色也明显比刚才暗了些......算了,还是赶紧回家吧。
zh.solution: 我是一个唯物主义者,有一天,我回家的路上捡的了一个被海浪冲到岸上的瓶子,从瓶子里飞出这个自称能实现愿望的精灵的神秘生物。如此巨大的生物竟从这么小一个瓶子里出来,还能说话,还说能实现愿望,这与我对世界的认知相违背。于是,我许愿忘记有关瓶子的一切并让瓶子回到大海里去。愿望实现了,我也忘记了有关瓶子的一切。

title: Lover
condition: A couple was deeply in love. One day, the girl told the boy she had a dream where she was in a dark place and couldn't find him. The boy comforted her. Soon after, the boy suddenly broke up with her, and the girl was very sad. Deduce the reason for the breakup.
solution: The boy had a terminal illness and knew he didn't have much time left. He didn't want the girl to suffer more later, so he deliberately broke up with her, hoping she would hate him. This way, she could move on from the relationship faster and start a new life. The girl's dream made the boy feel it was a premonition, further solidifying his decision to break up.

不久后,男孩突然提出了分手,女孩非常伤心。请推理男孩分手原因。
zh.solution: 男孩得了绝症,他知道自己时日无多,不想让女孩以后更加痛苦,所以故意提出分手,让女孩恨他这样女孩就能更快地走出这段感情,开始新的生活。而女孩说的那个梦让男孩觉得这是一种预示,更加坚定了他分手的决心。

title: Wife
condition: "Your wife is so young and beautiful." They smiled. "Your wife is so young and beautiful." He smiled.
solution: The man's wife was young and beautiful, and he always received compliments when he took her out. Both husband and wife were very happy. Later, his wife gradually aged, developing wrinkles and loose skin. The man heard fewer and fewer compliments and envious remarks. So, he pulled his wife's facial skin tight and stitched it up behind her head, making her appear perpetually young and beautiful. "Your wife is so young and beautiful." He finally heard compliments again and smiled happily. But his wife, enduring the pain and tightness of her facial skin, could no longer smile.

title: Snow White
condition: I was Snow White, living happily with the prince. One day, news of the seven dwarves' deaths came from the forest, and I was very sad, but the prince looked pleased. The prince gave me a glass of milk before bed, hoping I would rest well, and I never woke up again.
solution: The prince had necrophilia; he liked me when I was 'asleep.' However, due to the presence of the seven dwarves, he was afraid of retaliation if he killed me, so he hesitated. The prince sent his subordinates to assassinate the seven dwarves, and the assassins in the forest finally completed their mission. I was very sad upon hearing the news of the dwarves' deaths (I was unaware of the cause), but the prince looked pleased because his opportunity had arrived. title: Obsession
condition: Time is almost up... Because of my obsession, she lost her mother forever.
solution: My wife was one of the victims of a serial murder case, but the police were never able to track down the killer. With the statute of limitations almost expiring, nineteen years after the last crime, I had no choice but to imitate the killer's modus operandi, kill a woman, and dispose of her body to reset the statute of limitations so the police would continue their investigation. But when I saw that crying girl clutching her mother's corpse, an intense wave of guilt and remorse washed over me. Because of my obsession, I had shattered yet another family. What difference was there between me and that heinous murderer?

zh.title: 执念

title: Affectionate Couple
condition: After Xiao Ming cheated, his wife came back to life. They both achieved their wishes. "You two are truly affectionate."
solution: Xiao Ming cheated. To legitimize his mistress, he pretended to love his wife while secretly plotting with the mistress to kill his wife with poison and disfigure her body. Finally, the mistress underwent plastic surgery to resemble his wife and appeared by Xiao Ming's side, thus avoiding suspicion. However, his wife found out about all this. So, she turned the tables, swapped the poison, killed the mistress, and disfigured her face. Xiao Ming thought his wife died as per his and the mistress's plot, while the wife successfully killed and impersonated the mistress, surviving. Her husband genuinely loved her, from their respective perspectives, both their wishes were fulfilled.

title: Christmas Gift
condition: Today Dad told me to go to bed early, but late at night, I heard a knock at the door. Curious, I pushed open the door to see if Dad had prepared the Christmas gift. In the living room, a red Christmas tree was covered with decorations, an un-stuffed turkey was on the dining table, and a green Santa Claus was hidden in the fireplace. Then, another knock echoed from outside the door.
solution: I am red-green colorblind. Tonight is Christmas Eve. Dad lied to Mom that he would be working late, but actually, he was preparing Christmas gifts for us. Mom believed him and brought a strange uncle home. Dad, who had been hiding in the house all along, collapsed. He killed this strange uncle, skinned him, and threw the skin into the fireplace. Dad disemboweled Mom and placed her on the dining table, hanging her entrails on the Christmas tree. Afterward, Dad also hanged himself from the eaves outside the main door. title: Blessing or Bane
condition:
Near China's northern borders lived a man well versed in the practices of Taoism thought, where spontaneous events can and often do bring unforeseen results, such as good results coming from bad events or bad results coming from good intentions. When one day one of this man's horses, for no reason at all, got into the territory of the northern tribes, everyone commiserated with him.

"Perhaps this will soon turn out to be a blessing, we'll see," said the man.

After a few months, his animal came back, leading a fine horse from the north. Everyone congratulated him.

"Perhaps this will soon turn out to be a cause of misfortune, we'll see," said the man.

Since he was well-off and kept good horses, his son became fond of riding and eventually broke his thigh bone falling from the very horse from the north and was never able to walk freely. Everyone commiserated with him.

"Perhaps this will soon turn out to be a blessing, we'll see," said the man.

One year later, the northern tribes started a big invasion of the border regions.

What blessing do you suppose came from the son breaking his leg?
solution:
All able-bodied young men took up arms and fought against the invaders, and as a result, around the border, nine out of ten of these men died. This man's son did not join in the fighting because he was crippled and was absolved from the obligation for his disability, so he escaped death.

Taoism, here refers to a Chinese system of thought and is characterized by spontaneous creativity and by regular alternations of phenomena (such as day following night, good results coming bad events or bad results coming from good intentions.) that proceed without effort. Effortless action may be illustrated by the conduct of water, which unresistingly accepts the lowest level and yet wears away the hardest substance.

title: Birbal the Wise - VI

Emperor Akbar once ruled over India. He was a wise and intelligent ruler, and he had in his court the Nine Gems, his nine advisors, who were each known for a particular skill. One of these Gems was Birbal, known for his wit and wisdom. The story below is one of the examples of his wit. Do you have it in you to find out the answer?

The stable-keeper however, was extremely jealous of Birbal, and decided to deliver a sick and weak horse to him. The horse was delivered to Birbal's stable. solution:
Birbal knew he could not accuse the stable-keeper directly of sending a bad horse as, indirectly, he would be accusing the Emperor and, for that, he may well follow the horse into the nether world.

Hearing this, the stable-keeper, who went and hid behind a pillar when he saw Birbal come without the horse, rushed out and prostrated before the emperor, completely in a panic. He confessed his crime to the Emperor and begged for mercy. He also asked Birbal for forgiveness and waited for the Emperor to announce a suitable punishment for him.

Emperor Akbar was pleased at Birbal's sense of diplomacy which prevented him from directly accusing the stable-keeper of sending him a sick horse and ordered the stable-keeper to provide Birbal with a good quality horse. title: Be Positive!

solution: John was telling Jane that his blood group was B positive! All the incidents he mentioned were cases where he would be hurt and might require blood. He wanted her to keep a cool mind and remember his blood group immediately when it was necessary to do so.

When the medium arrived a few days later, she asked the parents to take her to the place where they had last seen their daughter. The mother and father took the medium to the park and watched her sit down on the grass, close her eyes, and do into a trance. Then she exclaimed, “Your daughter is alive! Her heart is beating and her lungs are breathing.”

The happy parents held hands tightly. The mother asked, “But where is she now?”

“She sees a luxurious house with expensive furniture,” the medium continued, “And only the most delicious food is in her stomach”.

The mother breathed a sigh of relief again and pleaded, "But where is our daughter? Please tell us!"

The medium hesitated for a while. Then her eyes opened wide, and she screamed, "She’s all over the world!"

For a while, the parents of the missing girl stood motionless with their mouths wide open. Then they suddenly understood what the medium meant and fell on the floor, crying bitterly.

What happened to the girl?
solution: The girl was kidnapped and sold for organs.

title: Clever Jenny XIII
condition:
Jenny parked her car and let herself into her Mom's house, calling out, "I'm here!"

She looked around the well-lighted living room, admiring how much tidier her Mom's place was than her own.

"Hi, Jen; I'm almost ready. We want to get there early to get a close parking place."

"Sure thing! We have concert reservations, but I'd rather not walk a mile to the hall!"

"I just have to get on my scarf and fix my hair. Oh, darn! The scarf's wrinkled, and I especially wanted to wear it with this dress! You know, your Dad got me this scarf."

Jenny offered, "Can I press it for you quickly while you do your hair?"

"Thanks, Jen, but my iron is kaput; I need to go buy another one! (Sigh!) Guess I won't wear my scarf!"

Jenny replied, "Oh, what a shame!" Then she had an idea.

"Mom, you go fix your hair and let me see what I can do."

"OK, but please don't use that wrinkle spray on it; the colors might run!"

A few minutes later, Mom appeared, looking well coiffed. Seeing her scarf, she exclaimed, "Oh, dearest Jenny! My scarf looks great! Thank you; this is splendid! What did you do to it?"

What had Jenny done?
solution:
Jenny removed the shade from the lamp in Mom's living room. Very quickly, she slid the scarf back and forth along the warm light bulb. The heat from the bulb removed the wrinkles and creases from the scarf and soon it looked as if it had been ironed.

Note: This trick is only effective for small items like scarves or collars; it won't work well on pants or other large items. If you try this at home, use a scrap of material or an old handkerchief first to check to make sure the bulb isn't hot enough to scorch the fabric of what you want to wear. Also if you aren't such a great housekeeper, better dust off the top of the bulb first!

title: After Dinner Car Troubles
condition:
This teaser is based on a weird but true story from a few years ago.

A complaint was received by the president of a major car company:

"This is the fourth time I have written you, and I don't blame you for not answering me because I must sound crazy, but it is a
fact that we have a tradition in our family of having ice cream for dessert after dinner each night. Every night after we've eaten, the family votes on which flavor of ice cream we should have and I drive down to the store to get it. I recently purchased a new Pantsmobile from your company and since then my trips to the store have created a problem. You see, every time I buy vanilla ice cream my car won't
start. If I get any other kind of ice cream the car starts just fine. I want you to know I'm serious about this question, no matter
how silly it sounds: 'What is there about a Pantsmobile that makes it not start when I get vanilla ice cream, and easy to start whenever I get any other kind?'"

The Pantsmobile company President was understandably skeptical about the letter, but he sent an engineer to check it out anyway. He had arranged to meet the man just after dinner time, so the two hopped into the car and drove to the grocery store. The man bought vanilla ice cream that night and, sure enough, after they came back to the car it wouldn't start for several minutes.

The engineer returned for three more nights. The first night, the man got chocolate. The car started right away. The second night, he got strawberry and again the car started right up. The third night he bought vanilla and the car failed to start.

There was a logical reason why the man's car wouldn't start when he bought vanilla ice cream. What was it?
solution:
Vanilla ice cream was the most popular flavor and was on display in a little case near the express check out, while the other flavors were in the back of the store and took more time to select and check out. This mattered because the man's car was experiencing vapor lock, which is excess heat boiling the fuel in the fuel line and the resulting air bubbles blocking the flow of fuel until the car has enough time to cool. When the car was running there was enough pressure to move the bubbles along, but not when the car was trying to start.

Moral of the story: Sometimes even insane sounding problems are real. A better moral: Chocolate ice cream cures vapor lock.

title: Черная птица
condition: Я был один в горах, изучал птиц. Я заметил неизвестную мне ранее черную птицу, когда случайно упал с высоты и сломал себе ногу. Я совершенно не мог встать. И я бы точно умер от жажды или голода, если бы не странная девушка, которая стала навещать меня каждую ночь. У неё были черные волосы, длинные ресницы и обворожительная улыбка. Она никогда не разговаривала, просто ложилась на меня и кормила из своего рта. Я думаю, что это было сырое мясо, а иногда она поила меня теплой кровью, но из-за голода я радовался любой еде. Сразу после этого она уходила. Примерно месяц спустя нога стала заживать. Я смог встать и добраться до дома, наконец поесть нормальную еду. К моему удивлению ночью она снова каким-то образом пробралась в мою комнату и разбудила меня. Она снова начала медленно залезать на меня, что-то пережевывая. Я пытался сопротивляться, но тщетно. Она силком протиснула еду в мой рот из своего и, улыбаясь, ушла. На этот раз я был сыт, поэтому почувствовал отвращение. Выплюнув всё на пол и придя в себя я смог рассмотреть в этом комке куски чьего-то глаза. Это повторялось каждую ночь. Хотя я был ей благодарен за спасение, это начало тревожить меня не на шутку. К счастью, спустя пару недель её приходы прекратились. С тех событий прошло два года. Сейчас я нахожусь на горе Фудзи, где снова встретил черную птицу. Теперь я всё понял. Мне осталось не долго. Знаете почему?
solution: Эта девушка — демон. Ей хотелось позаботиться о главном герое, продлить его жизнь. Спустя два года после последней кормёжки она снова пришла к главному герою, но не для кормежки. Она перевоплотилась в черную птицу и унесла его в своё гнездо на горе Фудзи. Она стала откусывать от него небольшие куски плоти каждый день, чтобы перемещаться во времени и кормить его же в прошлом, ведь иначе он умер бы от голода.

en.title: The black bird
en.condition: I was alone in the mountains studying birds. When I accidentally fell from a height and broke my leg, I noticed an unknown black bird. I couldn't even get up, and I would have died of thirst or hunger if it hadn’t been for a strange girl who started coming to me every night. She had black hair, long eyelashes, and a charming smile. She never talked but just lay on top of me and fed me from her mouth. I thought it was raw meat. Sometimes, she gave me warm blood to drink, but I was so hungry that enjoyed any food. She left immediately afterwards. About a month later, my leg felt better. I managed to get up, return home, and finally have a proper meal. I was surprised when at night she somehow got into my room again and woke me up. Chewing something, she slowly started climbing on top of me again. I tried to resist, but in vain. She forced the food into my mouth and left, smiling. This time I was full, so I felt an aversion. Spitting everything out on the floor and recollecting myself, I managed see pieces of someone’s eye in this lump. Since then, it happened every night. Although I was grateful to her for saving me, I begin to feel really worried. Fortunately, she stopped visiting me after a couple of weeks. Five years have passed since then. I’m on Mount Fuji now, and here I met the black bird again. Now I understand everything. My time is short. Do you know why?
en.solution: This girl is a demon. She wanted to take care of the main character and prolong his life. 5 years after the last feeding, she came to the main character again – but this time not for feeding. She transformed into the black bird and took him to her nest on Mount Fuji. Every day, she started biting off small pieces of his flesh to travel back in time and feed him in the past, because otherwise he would have starved to death.

title: Конкуренция

solution: Патент на первый телефонный аппарат с набором номера был выдан в позапрошлом веке американцу Элмону Строуджеру, гробовщику из Канзас-Сити. Дело в том, что в 1891 году в городе работали две погребальные конторы. Узнав, что супруга конкурента устроилась на телефонную станцию, Строуджер забеспокоился: ведь, когда абоненты просят соединить их с гробовщиком, она, наверняка, отправляет звонящих к своему мужу, его конкуренту! Тогда он придумал систему, позволяющую каждому абоненту самостоятельно соединяться с нужным номером прямо из дома, без посредников.

en.title: Rivalry
en.condition: At the end of the XIX century one american enterpreneur invented a system to withstand competition. This system we all use nowadays.
en.solution: This american enterpreneur was Almon Brown Strowger. Strowger patented his automatic telephone exchange and left the undertaking business to mass-produce his new invention. Anecdotally, Strowger's undertaking business was losing clients to a competitor whose telephone-operator wife was redirecting everyone who called for Strowger. Motivated to remove the intermediary operator, he invented the first automatic telephone exchange in 1889 and received its patent in 1891.It is reported that he initially constructed a model of his invention from a round collar box and some straight pins.

solution: The man has a superpower to foresee people's ages at death, but he can't see his own. After boarding the train, he notices that everyone seems to be about the same age as their death age. Finding this strange, he tests his theory by asking a few people, discovering they will all die this year. When the grandmother says she is 69 and she'll be 70 in 5 minutes, he realizes the train will have an accident within 5 minutes, killing everyone on board.

en.title: Greenland
en.condition: Over 80 percent of Greenland is covered in ice. But why then it was called Greenland (a green land)?
en.solution: The name Greenland comes from Scandinavian settlers. In the Norse sagas, it is said that Erik the Red was exiled from Iceland for murder. He set out in ships to find land rumoured to be to the northwest. After settling there, he named the land Grfnland (Greenland) to attract more people to settle there.

en.title: The expensive fake
en.condition: When it turned out that the painting was fake, it became 10 times more expensive. How did it happen?
en.solution: A lady approaches an antiquarian’s tent, spends long time looking at the paintings and stops at one of them with an inscription saying: “I. Repin”; the price tag said: ten rubles. — Here’s ten rubles. I’m taking the painting. But I’ll bring it back if it’s fake. I’ll be at my friends’ place, where Repin is having lunch today, and I'll show it to him. The lady brings the picture to her friends and shows it to Repin. He laughs. He asks for a pen and ink and signs at the bottom of the picture, “This is not Repin. I. Repin.” This painting returned to Sukharevka and was sold for a hundred rubles thanks to Repin’s autograph. An abstract from Vladimir Gilyarovsky’s book “Moscow and Muscovites”, 1926
